info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API for Mycelium admin operations (managers). Supports single request and batch. Scope and permission checks are enforced by use cases.
info.title: Mycelium Admin JSON-RPC API

methods.description: Returns this OpenRPC spec document. No params.
methods.name: rpc.discover

methods.description: Creates a system account (gateway manager, guests manager, or system manager). Requires manager privileges.
methods.name: managers.accounts.createSystemAccount

actor.description: System actor type: gatewayManager, guestsManager, systemManager

methods.description: Creates all system guest roles (subscriptions, users, account, guest, gateway, system, tenant managers with read/write). Requires manager privileges.
methods.name: managers.guestRoles.createSystemRoles

methods.description: Creates a new tenant with the given owner. Requires manager privileges.
methods.name: managers.tenants.create

methods.description: Lists tenants with optional filters (name, owner, metadata, tag) and pagination (pageSize, skip).
methods.name: managers.tenants.list

methods.description: Deletes a tenant by ID. Requires manager privileges.
methods.name: managers.tenants.delete

methods.description: Adds an owner to a tenant. Requires manager privileges.
methods.name: managers.tenants.includeTenantOwner

methods.description: Removes an owner from a tenant. Requires manager privileges.
methods.name: managers.tenants.excludeTenantOwner

methods.description: Adds a guest user to an account under the given guest role (child role). Requires account manager privileges on the tenant. Tenant ID, account ID and role ID must be provided.
methods.name: accountManager.guests.guestToChildrenAccount

roleId.description: Guest role ID (child role to assign)

methods.description: Lists guest roles with optional filters (name, slug, system) and pagination (pageSize, skip). Optional tenant ID to scope. Requires account manager privileges.
methods.name: accountManager.guestRoles.listGuestRoles

tenantId.description: Optional tenant ID to scope the list

methods.description: Returns details for a guest role by ID. Optional tenant ID to scope. Requires account manager privileges.
methods.name: accountManager.guestRoles.fetchGuestRoleDetails

tenantId.description: Optional tenant ID to scope the request

methods.description: Lists routes filtered by service ID or name. Restricted to GatewayManager users. Uses in-memory route storage.
methods.name: gatewayManager.routes.list

methods.description: Lists services filtered by ID or name. Restricted to GatewayManager users. Uses in-memory service storage.
methods.name: gatewayManager.services.list

methods.description: Lists tool operations from downstream OpenAPI specs with optional search (query, method, scoreCutoff) and pagination. Restricted to GatewayManager users.
methods.name: gatewayManager.tools.list

scoreCutoff.description: Minimum score cutoff for search matches

methods.description: Creates a guest role. Requires GuestsManager privileges. Permission: 0 = Read, 1 = Write.
methods.name: guestManager.guestRoles.create

system.description: Whether the role is a system role

methods.description: Lists guest roles with optional filters (name, slug, system) and pagination (pageSize, skip). Requires GuestsManager privileges.
methods.name: guestManager.guestRoles.list

methods.description: Deletes a guest role by ID. Requires GuestsManager privileges.
methods.name: guestManager.guestRoles.delete

methods.description: Updates name and/or description of a guest role. Requires GuestsManager privileges.
methods.name: guestManager.guestRoles.updateNameAndDescription
methods.summary: Update guest role name and description

methods.description: Updates permission of a guest role (0 = Read, 1 = Write). Requires GuestsManager privileges.
methods.name: guestManager.guestRoles.updatePermission

methods.description: Adds a child guest role to a parent role. Requires GuestsManager privileges.
methods.name: guestManager.guestRoles.insertRoleChild

methods.description: Removes a child guest role from a parent role. Requires GuestsManager privileges.
methods.name: guestManager.guestRoles.removeRoleChild

methods.description: Creates a subscription account for the tenant. Requires SubscriptionsManager privileges.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.accounts.createSubscriptionAccount

methods.description: Creates or returns existing role-associated account. Requires SubscriptionsManager privileges.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.accounts.createRoleAssociatedAccount

methods.description: Lists accounts filtered by type (Staff, Manager, User, Subscription, TenantManager, ActorAssociated, RoleAssociated), status and pagination.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.accounts.list

accountType.description: Account type: Staff, Manager, User, Subscription, TenantManager, ActorAssociated, RoleAssociated

actor.description: Actor for ActorAssociated: gatewayManager, guestsManager, systemManager

status.description: Status: unverified, verified, inactive, archived, deleted

tenantId.description: Optional tenant ID (required for Subscription, TenantManager, RoleAssociated)

methods.description: Returns a single subscription account by ID. Optional tenant ID to scope.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.accounts.get

methods.description: Updates name and flags (isActive, isChecked, isArchived, isSystemAccount) of a subscription account.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.accounts.updateNameAndFlags

methods.description: Propagates a subscription account. Requires SubscriptionsManager privileges.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.accounts.propagateSubscriptionAccount

methods.description: Lists subscription accounts for which the given email is a guest. Optional roles filter.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.guests.listLicensedAccountsOfEmail

roles.description: Optional roles filter (array of { name, permission? })

methods.description: Adds a guest user (by email) to a subscription account under the given role.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.guests.guestUserToSubscriptionAccount

methods.description: Updates permit/deny flags for a guest user on a subscription account.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.guests.updateFlagsFromSubscriptionAccount

methods.description: Revokes a guest user (by email) from a subscription account role.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.guests.revokeUserGuestToSubscriptionAccount
methods.summary: Revoke user guest to subscription account

methods.description: Lists guest users on a subscription account with optional pagination.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.guests.listGuestOnSubscriptionAccount

methods.description: Lists guest roles with optional filters and pagination. Optional tenant ID to scope.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.guestRoles.list

methods.description: Returns details for a guest role by ID. Optional tenant ID to scope.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.guestRoles.get

methods.description: Registers a tag on a subscription account.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.tags.create

methods.description: Updates a tag (value, meta) on a subscription account.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.tags.update

methods.description: Deletes a tag from a subscription account.
methods.name: subscriptionsManager.tags.delete

methods.description: Registers a new error code. Requires SystemManager privileges.
methods.name: systemManager.errorCodes.create

methods.description: Lists error codes with optional filters (prefix, code, isInternal) and pagination.
methods.name: systemManager.errorCodes.list

methods.description: Returns an error code by prefix and code.
methods.name: systemManager.errorCodes.get

methods.description: Updates message and details of an error code.
methods.name: systemManager.errorCodes.updateMessageAndDetails
methods.summary: Update error code message and details

methods.description: Deletes an error code by prefix and code.
methods.name: systemManager.errorCodes.delete

methods.description: Registers a webhook. Method must be POST, PUT, PATCH or DELETE. Requires SystemManager privileges.
methods.name: systemManager.webhooks.create

method.description: Optional HTTP method: POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE

methods.description: Lists webhooks with optional filters (name, trigger) and pagination.
methods.name: systemManager.webhooks.list

methods.description: Updates a webhook (name, description, secret, isActive).
methods.name: systemManager.webhooks.update

methods.description: Deletes a webhook by ID.
methods.name: systemManager.webhooks.delete

methods.description: Creates a tenant-related subscription manager account. Requires TenantManager privileges.
methods.name: tenantManager.accounts.createSubscriptionManagerAccount

methods.description: Deletes a subscription account. Requires TenantManager privileges.
methods.name: tenantManager.accounts.deleteSubscriptionAccount

methods.description: Adds a guest user (by email) to a subscription manager account with the given permission (0 = Read, 1 = Write).
methods.name: tenantManager.guests.guestUserToSubscriptionManagerAccount
methods.summary: Guest user to subscription manager account

methods.description: Revokes a guest user (by email) from a subscription manager account role.
methods.name: tenantManager.guests.revokeUserGuestToSubscriptionManagerAccount
methods.summary: Revoke user guest to subscription manager account

methods.description: Registers a tag for the tenant (tenant-scoped, no account).
methods.name: tenantManager.tags.create

methods.description: Updates a tenant tag (value, meta).
methods.name: tenantManager.tags.update

methods.description: Deletes a tenant tag.
methods.name: tenantManager.tags.delete

methods.description: Returns details for a tenant by ID. Requires TenantManager privileges on the tenant.
methods.name: tenantManager.tenant.get

methods.description: Creates a tenant-related management account. Requires TenantOwner privileges.
methods.name: tenantOwner.accounts.createManagementAccount

methods.description: Soft deletes the tenant manager account. Requires TenantOwner privileges.
methods.name: tenantOwner.accounts.deleteTenantManagerAccount

methods.description: Registers tenant metadata (key/value). Key e.g. federal_revenue_register, locale, legal_name.
methods.name: tenantOwner.meta.create

methods.description: Deletes tenant metadata by key.
methods.name: tenantOwner.meta.delete

methods.description: Adds a user (by email) as tenant owner.
methods.name: tenantOwner.owner.guest

methods.description: Revokes a user (by email) from tenant ownership.
methods.name: tenantOwner.owner.revoke

methods.description: Updates the name and/or description of a tenant.
methods.name: tenantOwner.tenant.updateNameAndDescription

methods.description: Sets the tenant as archived.
methods.name: tenantOwner.tenant.updateArchivingStatus

methods.description: Sets the tenant as trashed.
methods.name: tenantOwner.tenant.updateTrashingStatus

methods.description: Sets the tenant as verified.
methods.name: tenantOwner.tenant.updateVerifyingStatus

methods.description: Approves an account after creation. Requires UsersManager privileges.
methods.name: userManager.account.approve

methods.description: Disapproves an approved account. Requires UsersManager privileges.
methods.name: userManager.account.disapprove

methods.description: Activates an account. Requires UsersManager privileges.
methods.name: userManager.account.activate

methods.description: Deactivates an account. Requires UsersManager privileges.
methods.name: userManager.account.deactivate

methods.description: Sets the target account as archived. Requires UsersManager privileges.
methods.name: userManager.account.archive

methods.description: Sets the target account as un-archived. Requires UsersManager privileges.
methods.name: userManager.account.unarchive

methods.description: Lists public discoverable services (tools and contexts). Optional filters: id, name. Uses MemDb.
methods.name: service.listDiscoverableServices

result.description: Object with description, tools, contexts, lastUpdated or null if not found
result.name: result

methods.description: Increases permissions of the account. Target type (to): Staff or Manager. Requires Staff privileges.
methods.name: staff.accounts.upgradePrivileges

methods.description: Decreases permissions of the account. Target type (to): Manager or User. Requires Staff privileges.
methods.name: staff.accounts.downgradePrivileges

methods.description: Creates an account for a physical person. Uses credentials from the request (multi-identity provider).
methods.name: beginners.accounts.create

methods.description: Returns the details of the account associated with the current user.
methods.name: beginners.accounts.get

methods.description: Updates the account name. Restricted to the account owner (accountId must match authenticated user's account).
methods.name: beginners.accounts.updateName

accountId.description: Account ID (must match the authenticated user's account)

methods.description: Deletes the account associated with the current user. Restricted to the account owner (accountId must match authenticated user's account).
methods.name: beginners.accounts.delete

accountId.description: Account ID (must match the authenticated user's account)

methods.description: Accepts an invitation to join an account as a guest. License must match account_id, guest_role_name and permission.
methods.name: beginners.guests.acceptInvitation

params.description: Account ID, guest role name, permission (0=Read, 1=Write)
params.name: params

accountId.description: Account ID the user is invited to

methods.description: Registers a metadata key-value for the current account (e.g. phone_number, telegram_user, locale, custom:key).
methods.name: beginners.meta.create

key.description: Meta key (e.g. phone_number, telegram_user, locale, custom:key)

methods.description: Updates a metadata key-value for the current account.
methods.name: beginners.meta.update

methods.description: Deletes a metadata key for the current account.
methods.name: beginners.meta.delete

methods.description: Returns the current user's Mycelium profile. Optionally expand licensed resources and tenants ownership as URL strings (withUrl, default true).
methods.name: beginners.profile.get

withUrl.description: If true (default), expand licensed resources and tenants ownership as URL strings

methods.description: Returns public info for a tenant. Profile must have tenant license or ownership.
methods.name: beginners.tenants.getPublicInfo

methods.description: Creates a connection string for the user account. Optional tenant_id, service_account_id, roles to scope the token.
methods.name: beginners.tokens.create

roles.description: Optional roles to scope the token

serviceAccountId.description: Optional service account ID to scope the token

tenantId.description: Optional tenant ID to scope the token

methods.description: Lists all connection strings for the current user.
methods.name: beginners.tokens.list

methods.description: Registers a new user. Optional Bearer token to register with provider; otherwise password required.
methods.name: beginners.users.create

methods.description: Validates activation token and activates the user.
methods.name: beginners.users.checkTokenAndActivateUser

methods.description: Starts the password reset process for the given email.
methods.name: beginners.users.startPasswordRedefinition

methods.description: Validates reset token and sets new password.
methods.name: beginners.users.checkTokenAndResetPassword

methods.description: Validates email and password. Returns { valid, user? }. Does not issue JWT.
methods.name: beginners.users.checkEmailPasswordValidity

methods.description: Starts TOTP activation for the user. Optional qrCode to get QR code URL.
methods.name: beginners.users.totpStartActivation

qrCode.description: If true, return QR code URL

methods.description: Finishes TOTP activation with the token from the authenticator app.
methods.name: beginners.users.totpFinishActivation

methods.description: Validates TOTP token and returns the user.
methods.name: beginners.users.totpCheckToken

methods.description: Disables TOTP for the user.
methods.name: beginners.users.totpDisable
